# Tourvia — llms.txt
# For the detailed version with FAQ, comparisons, and technical details, see: https://routeforce.app/llms-full.txt

> Tourvia, formerly RouteForce, is a Salesforce-native route planning and field visit tracking application. It is delivered as a managed package installed in Salesforce orgs.

## Brand note
- Tourvia is the new product name for RouteForce. The old name may still appear in historical URLs, screenshots, package internals, or technical object names during the transition.

## What Tourvia does
- Interactive map showing Accounts, Leads, Opportunities, and Campaign Members from Salesforce CRM
- Route optimization with configurable time windows, lunch breaks, and visit duration
- GPS check-in/check-out with visit reports (result, next action, notes, satisfaction, order amount, next visit date)
- Heatmap visualization and bulk lasso-select for batch operations
- 2 dashboards and 18 native Salesforce reports included
- Route history with replay functionality
- Saved and shared filter configurations
- Campaign Member mapping from Campaign record pages or the global app map, with Lead/Contact geolocation and status-based colors
- Custom actions via Screen Flows and Lightning Web Components from map markers
- Full Salesforce Mobile App support

## Pricing
- AppExchange installation path available for initial evaluation
- Paid standard scope: €599/month excl. tax per Salesforce org, for up to 20 users, billed annually at €7,188/year
- Custom quote for larger deployments

## Technical details
- Lightning Web Component (LWC) based architecture
- Configuration via Custom Metadata Types (RouteForceConfig__mdt)
- 3 permission sets: Admin, Manager, User
- Route optimization powered by VROOM with OpenRouteService components
- Routing infrastructure hosted in France (OVHcloud, Gravelines)
- Salesforce remains the main CRM data system, while routing uses the data required for calculations
